name: Sugarplum Cookies/Christmas Cookbook
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Dried or candied fruit, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar, butter, and shortening in a bowl until creamy.
2. Add egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. Stir in flour, vanilla, baking powder, and salt until combined.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Shape dough into balls using teaspoons, about 1 inch apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
8. Spread frosting evenly over the top of each cooled cookie.
9. Decorate with colored sugar, nonpareils, or chopped nuts if desired.
10. Repeat frosting process until all cookies are decorated.
